nasb.text: His servants arose and made a conspiracy and struck down Joash at the house of Millo as he was going down to Silla.

esv.text: His servants arose and made a conspiracy and struck down Joash in the house of Millo, on the way that goes down to Silla.

cnv.text: 約阿施的臣僕起來背叛，他們在米羅宮內，他下到悉拉的時候，擊殺了他。

ccb.text: 约阿施的臣仆谋反，在去悉拉途中的米罗宫杀了他。
